[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 100000100 2
1 111100001 5
2 011110000 4
3 101111110 7
4 011011111 7
5 011000101 4
6 111110011 7
7 101111111 8

01 10 111111111 a
12 21 011011111 7 match 4
23 32 111110111 8
34 43 111111111 a
45 54 100001111 5
56 65 111100101 6
67 76 111110001 6
70 07 111111110 8

02 20 111111111 a
13 31 111111111 a
24 42 011001111 6
35 53 111110111 8
46 64 111101111 8
57 75 111110100 6
60 06 111111111 a
71 17 011111111 8

03 30 111111111 a
14 41 011011111 7 match 4
25 52 111000101 5
36 63 111110011 7 match 6
47 74 011111111 8
50 05 101111110 7 match 3
61 16 111111111 a
72 27 011110101 6

04 40 101111111 8 match 7
15 51 111011111 8
26 62 111100101 6
37 73 111110011 7 match 6
